series_metadata.series_description: This record series is retained at BMV Columbus and consists of the following information with regards to every deputy registrar within each district: Contract, contingency list, surety bond, information sheet for deputy registrar appointment, deputy registrar schedule, proof of business insurance, and Deputy Registrar Request for Proposal; Backgrounds completed by the Bureau of Criminal Identification and Investigation for deputy registrar employees; Deputy registrar political contribution statements; All records that deputy registrars maintain in accordance with section D of the Deputy Registrar Manual to include end of day reports, consignment invoices, Missing Affidavits (BMV5702), chargeable and non-chargeable inventories, Error Correction Worksheets (BMV5716), and deputy registrar annual inventory reports; Financial reviews, field representative files, lease information, training records, and digital site photographs; and correspondence, broadcasts, evaluations, work schedules, contracts, motor voter transmission forms, and abstract files, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned, indexed and verified. ; Electronic: Records approved deputy registrars are retained period of approved contract (three years), four years. Records those deputy registrar applicants who were not approved, are retained period of contract which they applied (three years), one year
